name: @moxxy/plugin-channel-signal
description: Signal messenger channel for moxxy via a signal-cli JSON-RPC sidecar. Links as a secondary Signal device (QR pairing), drives the Session from allow-listed senders (Note to Self by default), and replies with buffered chunked sends. Autonomous allow-list permission model.
author: Michal Makowski <michal.makowski97@gmail.com>

requirements.name: @moxxy/plugin-vault
requirements.hint: signal resolves the vault from the service registry for its account number + sender allow-list; @moxxy/plugin-vault must load first

setup.title: Signal account
setup.description: The phone number of the Signal account moxxy links to as a secondary device (like Signal Desktop). No API token: run `moxxy channels signal pair` afterwards and scan the QR with your phone (Signal → Settings → Linked Devices → Link New Device). Requires the signal-cli binary on PATH (`brew install signal-cli`).
